channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com

item.title: Darkwood co-creator announces psychological horror game HOARDER for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

To hoard is to possess, to possess is to control.

Publisher Awaken Realms and developer Byzel, an “indie team” within Awaken Realms Digital led by Darkwood co-creator Gustaw Stachaszewski, have announced psychological horror game HOARDER for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC (Steam). A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Awaken Realms:

To hoard is to possess, to possess is to control. What hope do you have in controlling the truth?

Welcome to HOARDER, a game by a team led by the co-creator of Darkwood, a unique horror experience.

HOARDER begins as a mundane cleaning simulator that spirals into a submerged nightmare. Pilot a submarine, recover what shouldn’t be found, and uncover the secrets of your new home by night.

This is an adventure game with horror elements, not tied to a single genre. It begins as an atmospheric take on the cleaning simulator formula. The player is tasked with decluttering the house of a hoarder couple. As the cleaning progresses, they uncover details about the previous inhabitants and what happened to them. A mystery slowly takes shape, but it’s up to the player whether they want to follow it. If they earn enough cash through cleaning, they can simply end the game there by buying a ticket for a dream vacation.

However, if the player digs deeper and is curious enough, they will uncover a huge secret — an underground staircase of unnatural proportions. If they choose to venture further, they will find themselves in an environment in stark contrast to everything they’ve experienced so far. The established rules of gameplay begin to break down. Quest descriptions and markers become corrupted. The familiar mechanics of the cleaning simulator are gone.

  • ❮
  • ❯

At the bottom of the staircase, the player arrives at a mysterious facility where the main part of the game takes place. A day-and-night cycle begins, and the facility becomes the player’s new home. Each day, they explore more of it, as it changes over time and through their actions. They can operate an underwater submarine to explore the deep-sea floor, viewed through a LiDAR scanner. In the outside world, they come across all sorts of strange finds, which can be brought back to the base and used as salvage, to unlock new parts of the facility, upgrade existing ones, or push the story forward.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/darkwood-co-creator-announces-psychological-horror-game-hoarder-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Ancient Egypt-set cozy open-world life simulation game Fields of Aaru announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Zymartu Games, an independent studio founded by husband-and-wife team Marcel and Thu, has announced Fields of Aaru, a cozy open-world life simulation game set in the afterlife of Ancient Egypt. It has been in development for three years and will launch for PC via Steam in Q4 2026. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Zymartu Games:

About

A cozy life sim set in the mystical afterlife of Ancient Egypt. Farm along the Nile, befriend the locals, and decorate your eternal home. Venture into the desert and discover oases, pyramids, and tombs. Unlock magical powers by restoring ancient obelisks and making offerings to the gods.

Fields of Aaru drops you into the ancient Egyptian afterlife, where you live out a second life along the Nile. Build a home on the river, help the village by fixing things that have fallen into disrepair, and spend your days farming, fishing, and working the riverbanks where wildlife gathers. When you’re ready, journey into the desert to uncover ancient ruins, tombs, and hidden secrets.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Befriend the Locals – Meet the villagers, take on quests, and help restore the town. Get to know the people of Aaru and lend a hand through quests that fix up the town and bring daily life back into rhythm. Along the way you’ll learn ancient crafts like shaping stone, firing clay, and irrigating your fields.
  • Harvest the Nile’s Bounty – Build your daily routine around farming, fishing, and gathering. Plant crops in fertile soil, cast a line in the Nile, and head out to gather raw materials you’ll need for tools and building. Use irrigation and shadufs to bring water to new fields. Dig canals, shape the land, and expand what you can grow.
  • Venture Into the Desert – Step beyond the Nile’s reach and cross the sands to discover hidden oases, ruins, and ancient tombs. Carry water and look for shade as you head into the open desert. Search for oases, explore ruins, and descend into tombs to uncover rare materials and lost knowledge buried beneath the sand. What you bring back changes what you can craft and build back along the Nile.
  • Appease the Gods – Make offerings to the gods to earn blessings and unlock new powers. Uncover shrines scattered across the world and bring offerings to earn the gods’ favor. Each god offers their own set of boons. Ptah empowers your tools and craftwork, Hapi speeds up crop growth and makes harvests more bountiful, and Sekhmet grants protection and combat prowess for the desert and its dangers.
  • Discover New Lands – Cross the Nile to reach new regions with brand-new landscapes, mysteries, and treasures. Leave the familiar riverbanks behind and explore new lands where the sands turn white and pyramids rise from the horizon. Restore ancient obelisks to awaken their power, creating new ways to travel between distant regions.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/ancient-egypt-set-cozy-open-world-life-simulation-game-fields-of-aaru-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Mamon King coming to PS5 on March 20
item.content:encoded:
• PS5

Monster-raising simulation game currently available for Switch and PC.

LiTMUS will release monster-raising simulation game Mamon King for PlayStation 5 on March 20, the company announced. It is available now in regions where it is already March 20.

Mamon King first launched for Switch and PC via Steam on December 11, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via PlayStation Store:

About

Players are special beings who can connect with Mamons (monsters) summoned from another world. Raise and train your Mamons with kindness, and sometimes strictness!

After winning countless tournaments, when you defeat the strongest Mamon, you will become the world’s king: the Mamon King!

The monster-raising game set on a ranch has evolved!

Experience a new kind of raising in Mamon King!

Key Features

  • 38 Unique Mamons – Mammon boast distinctive appearances, each excelling in different training areas and possessing varying lifespans. Grasping their traits is your first step to victory.
  • Over 170 Skills – Mamon’s signature skills go beyond mere attack and defense, creating deep strategic depth. Master evolving skills through repeated use to forge even more powerful weapons.
  • Experience the Ultimate Tactical Battle in One-on-One Command Combat – It’s not just about attacking, defending, buffing, or debuffing. Using skills consumes SP, and more powerful skills demand greater SP—or even greater sacrifices. Timing your moves will decide your fate. Experience unparalleled tactical depth in this one-on-one command-based battle system, designed to be accessible yet offering the most intense strategic gameplay.
  • Strengthen Your Mamon Through Training, Tournaments, and Expeditions – Training isn’t the only way to hone your Mamon—it’s also about deciding what to do each week at home. Mamon grows stronger not only through tournaments against rivals but also via Expeditions, where you advance through uncharted lands rumored to hold ancient Mamon in a board game-style format.
  • Your Unique Mamon – A Mamon’s potential blossoms through your skill and luck. Inheritance Summoning passes on the power of your trained Mamon. And with help from a shady scientist or a muscle-bound trainer, your Mamon might gain powers beyond its natural limits?


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/mamon-king-coming-to-ps5-on-march-20
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
